page.title: IoT Integration - IVAFlow
page.metaDescription: Connect the Physical & Digital World. The only BPMS built for IoT from day one.

data.title: Connect the Physical & Digital World
data.subtitle: The only BPMS built for IoT from day one. Connect any sensor, device, or industrial equipment directly to your workflows—no middleware required.
data.description: Transform physical events into automated digital workflows with native IoT integration.

badges.text: 🔗 Any IoT device triggers workflows automatically

data.title: Built for Industrial IoT
data.subtitle: Native integration with sensors, devices, and industrial equipment

items.title: Device Connectivity
items.description: Connect any IoT device using standard protocols like MQTT, HTTP, CoAP, and WebSockets.

items.title: Event-Driven Workflows
items.description: Trigger workflows automatically when sensors detect changes or devices send data.

items.title: Device Control
items.description: Send commands back to devices to control actuators, relays, and industrial equipment.

items.title: Real-Time Monitoring
items.description: Visualize live data streams from all connected devices in customizable dashboards.

items.title: Secure Communication
items.description: Enterprise-grade security for all device communications with TLS encryption and authentication.

items.title: Edge Computing
items.description: Process data at the edge for low-latency responses and reduced bandwidth usage.

data.title: Connect Any IoT Device
data.subtitle: From simple sensors to complex industrial equipment

items.title: Environmental Sensors
items.description: Temperature, humidity, air quality, light, and weather sensors

items.title: GPS Trackers
items.description: Vehicle tracking, asset location, and geofencing devices

items.title: Motion & Security
items.description: PIR sensors, door contacts, cameras, and alarm systems

items.title: Industrial Equipment
items.description: PLCs, SCADA systems, and manufacturing machinery

items.title: Utility Meters
items.description: Water, gas, electricity, and energy consumption monitors

items.title: Medical Devices
items.description: Patient monitors, diagnostic equipment, and health trackers

items.title: Fleet Telematics
items.description: Vehicle diagnostics, fuel sensors, and driver behavior monitors

items.title: Construction Equipment
items.description: Heavy machinery sensors, site monitoring, and safety systems
